metadata.purpose: Formal R6 future unlock decision matrix built on top of the prerequisite baseline. This asset records strategic decision only and does not authorize unlock implementation.

capability_domains.decision_rationale: 商业必要性低于 projection 型外发路径，且会同时放大产品化、支持、合规与 owner 控制复杂度；prerequisite 已齐，但不值得把它作为 R6 后的优先 unlock 方向。
required_preconditions_already_met: prerequisite matrix already machine-readable
release/runtime/model manifests already reference prerequisite baseline
rollback and emergency-off readiness are already declared as prerequisites
remaining_blockers: R6 decision does not approve implementation
external software release remains BLOCKED
no productized external operating model or owner-control plan has been approved
capability_domains.why_not_now: 对当前 internal-first 平台的干扰最大，但近期商业增益最弱；继续 internal-first 更优。

capability_domains.decision_rationale: 与现有 LeadPack 商业形态最贴近，且当前 already approval+audit gated；如果未来要进入 unlock 候选，优先级最高，但仍只能讨论 projection-only + 审批审计强化，不是放开 live execution。
required_preconditions_already_met: approval chain and audit chain are already formalized
delivery matrix already enforces projection-only external delivery
release checklist and regression already cover prerequisite baseline
candidate matrix can be attached as the single projection boundary source
activation prep evidence pack, runbook, replay artifact, signoff packet and review gate can be assembled as review-only assets

activation design / implementation prep matrix can define owner signoff execution, approval/audit layering, status hardening, rollback/cancel/emergency-off and implementation-prep gate without approving implementation
remaining_blockers: R6 only classifies it as candidate and does not authorize implementation
every external delivery remains approval-and-audit gated
activation prep still requires manual review and owner signoff before any later activation discussion
activation prep ready for review is not activation-ready and not external-ready
activation design / implementation prep ready for review is not implementation-approved
implementation decision requires separate approval chain, review gate, audit ref and owner signoff state sources
capability_domains.why_not_now: 现有 prerequisite 只证明它值得进入候选序列，不证明 external delivery contract、projection scope、rollback playbook 已设计完成。

capability_domains.decision_rationale: 真实触达对合规、审计、停机和非技术 owner 的控制要求过高；即使 future-unlockable，也必须先走 shadow/internal-governed，再考虑 canary。
required_preconditions_already_met: runtime permission layer is already in place
high-restriction release gate and audit prerequisites are already defined
shadow/canary and rollback prerequisites are already machine-readable
remaining_blockers: Stage 8 live execution remains blocked by default
no shadow lane, canary threshold or owner-operated runbook has been approved
personal contact channels remain never-default-open
capability_domains.why_not_now: 它会直接放大触达合规和 owner 控制负担，不适合在 R6 后立即进入实现候选。

capability_domains.decision_rationale: 涉及资金、退款、审计回放和逆操作能力，风险最高；商业收益不能覆盖治理成本，因此继续 deny-by-default。
required_preconditions_already_met: payment replay and rollback are already captured as prerequisites
runtime permission layer and emergency-off semantics already exist
release checklist already blocks live payment by default
remaining_blockers: Stage 9 live payment execution remains blocked by default
no reversible payment runbook has been approved
refund and audit replay controls are not approved for live use
capability_domains.why_not_now: 资金链路对 owner 控制和责任链要求最高，近期不值得进入 implementation 候选。

capability_domains.decision_rationale: 真实交付虽然比真实支付略低风险，但仍会引入归档、回放、客户确认和异常补发责任；必须保持 deny-by-default。
required_preconditions_already_met: delivery replay and rollback prerequisites are already machine-readable
Stage 9 typed workflow and governed writeback skeleton already exist
release checklist already keeps direct Stage 9 delivery blocked
remaining_blockers: Stage 9 live delivery execution remains blocked by default
no reversible delivery acknowledgement runbook has been approved
archive/retrieval/partial-redelivery controls are not approved for live use
capability_domains.why_not_now: 它会直接把 internal governed skeleton 推向真实履约责任，当前不应进入实现候选。

capability_domains.decision_rationale: 外部化模型使用存在边界泄漏、外部表述误用和 owner 难以直观控制的问题；虽然有 eval/output-target prerequisite，但目前更适合作为后续 shadow 设计议题，而不是 immediate candidate。
required_preconditions_already_met: external shadow/boundary/canary eval suites are already defined
output target matrix already blocks final decisions and external leakage
model governance signoff prerequisites are already formalized
remaining_blockers: model externalized usage remains off by default
no approved shadow lane or bounded external assist surface exists
R6 does not approve any client-facing model implementation
capability_domains.why_not_now: 当前仓库的商业主路径不是 externalized model assist；先做 projection/value path 更划算。

capability_domains.decision_rationale: 外部 tool/provider 直接动作最容易突破 audit、审批和 owner 控制边界；在当前 internal-first 平台下缺乏足够商业必要性，不应进入近期 unlock 路径。
required_preconditions_already_met: shadow-only prerequisite baseline already exists
boundary eval and audit trace prerequisites are already formalized
remaining_blockers: tool provider externalized usage remains shadow only
no approved direct mutation or external action contract exists
R6 explicitly rejects near-term unlock sequencing for this domain
capability_domains.why_not_now: 它对 owner 控制最不友好，也最容易把 decision batch误滑成 implementation batch。

capability_domains.decision_rationale: 在不触碰 live execution 的前提下，扩展 source/vendor externalized usage 有明确商业价值，且更符合 internal-governed 先行模式；因此可进入候选序列，但只讨论受审计、可回放、非个人/非私有渠道。
required_preconditions_already_met: source/vendor/provider boundary catalogs are already frozen
trace and audit reservation fields are already present
contact/source policy already blocks personal, private and unauthorized channels
remaining_blockers: R6 only promotes it to candidate and does not authorize implementation
candidate surface and query trace contract still need a design gap batch
personal/private/unauthorized channels remain denied
capability_domains.why_not_now: 当前只具备 prerequisite baseline，还没有把 candidate vendor/source role、approval path 和 owner control 做成 post-R6 设计包。

capability_domains.decision_rationale: 若未来要扩展 external surface，最可讨论的也只能是 approved projection/summary surface；它有商业意义，但必须排在 leadpack delivery 与 source/vendor candidate 之后。
required_preconditions_already_met: delivery matrix already keeps direct stage8/stage9 object export blocked
public boundary and field policy already enforce projection-only semantics
approval and audit prerequisites are already formalized
remaining_blockers: external export surface remains BLOCKED
only approved projection contracts are discussable
no canary/internal-governed export envelope has been approved
capability_domains.why_not_now: 它的价值依赖前置 projection contract 稳定，必须晚于 leadpack delivery 与 source/vendor candidate。

recommended_sequence.why_this_order: 最贴近现有商业交付形态，且不要求 live execution 或 external software release。
可增强上游线索质量，但仍能保持 internal-governed 与 trace-first。
只能在 projection contract 已稳定后才值得讨论。
有 bounded assist 价值，但不应挤占前述更直接的业务路径。
只有在 internal-first 路线稳定后，才可能讨论真实触达。
产品化与运维成本高，近期不应优先于更窄、更可控的外发路径。
真实交付责任应晚于 candidate surface 与触达路径评估。
资金与退款链路风险最高，放在序列最后。

notes: R6 decision matrix is decision-only and does not authorize unlock implementation.
FUTURE_UNLOCK_CANDIDATE means worth entering a later decision-to-design gap batch, not approved to build live execution or external release.
Any later unlock implementation still requires a separate batch, mandatory human review, and domain-specific escalation where applicable.
